implementation.slice: A 44px accessible Test sound control creates and resumes AudioContext inside the click gesture, emits a 523.25 Hz sine pulse for 220 ms at bounded gain 0.08, then records pulse metadata and render-progress classification.

verification.deterministic_contract: Committed fake AudioContext coverage verifies resume, 523.25 Hz frequency assignment, bounded envelope, exact start/stop timing, and unsupported fallback.
verification.fresh_checkout: blocked: execution container could not resolve github.com

rollback.effect: Restores passive audio observability without the diagnostic control or generated pulse.

limits: Source and contract commits do not prove that Vercel deployed the change.
Browser render progress does not prove the user heard the tone or that the physical speaker path was unmuted.
A real iPhone Safari retest remains required.
No payment or conversion behavior was added.
